wiki_overview.content:
我将基于提供的信息对Gate Flow项目进行全面分析。让我首先查看一些关键的配置文件和组件。 # Gate Flow - A/B测试实验平台项目架构分析 ## 1. 项目介绍 ### 项目定位 Gate Flow是一个功能完整的企业级A/B测试实验平台，提供从实验创建到决策归档的一站式解决方案。该平台旨在降低实验门槛，保障实验质量，提升决策效率，并沉淀实验知识。 ### 核心目标 - **降低实验门槛**：非技术用户也能自助创建、运行、分析实验 - **保障实验质量**：内置SRM校验、统计功效计算、护栏监控等质量门禁 - **提升决策效率**：自动化报告生成、智能决策建议、一键全量/回滚 - **沉淀实验知识**：实验知识库、经验复用、组织级实验文化积累 ### 目标受众 - 产品经理 - 数据分析师 - 工程师 - 管理层 ## 2. 技术架构 ### 整体架构设计 ```mermaid graph TB subgraph "前端应用层" Admin[管理控制台
Admin Console] Marketing[营销站点
Marketing Site] end subgraph "后端服务层 (Victor)" WebAPI[Web API
(REST)] Service[业务服务
(Business)] Bucketing[分桶引擎
(Engine)] Stats[统计分析
(Analysis)] end subgraph "基础设施层" MySQL[MySQL 8.0] Redis[Redis 7] Kafka[Kafka] ClickHouse[ClickHouse] SDK[SDK/API] end Admin --> WebAPI Marketing --> WebAPI WebAPI --> Service Service --> Bucketing Service --> Stats Service --> MySQL Service --> Redis Service --> Kafka Stats --> ClickHouse WebAPI --> SDK ``` ### 技术栈概览 #### 前端技术栈 - **框架**: React 18, TypeScript 5.6 - **构建工具**: Vite 5.4 - **状态管理**: Zustand 4.5 - **路由**: React Router 6.26 - **UI组件**: Lucide React, Recharts - **样式**: TailwindCSS 4.0 - **拖拽**: @dnd-kit/core - **包管理**: pnpm 9+ (Monorepo) #### 后端技术栈 - **后端框架**: Spring Boot 3.4.0, Java 17 - **ORM框架**: MyBatis-Plus 3.5.15 - **数据库**: MySQL 8.0, Redis 7, ClickHouse - **消息队列**: Apache Kafka - **缓存**: Caffeine (本地), Redis (分布式) - **数据迁移**: Flyway 9.5.1 - **HTTP客户端**: OkHttp 4.12.0 - **JSON处理**: Jackson 2.17.0 - **API文档**: SpringDoc OpenAPI 2.5.0 - **构建工具**: Maven 3.x - **容器化**: Docker, Docker Compose ## 3. 项目结构分析 ### Monorepo架构 ```mermaid graph TD subgraph "根目录" PackageJSON[package.json] PnpmWorkspace[pnpm-workspace.yaml] TsConfigBase[tsconfig.base.json] end subgraph "apps/" Admin[admin/] Marketing[marketing/] end subgraph "packages/" Shared[shared/] end subgraph "docs/" DocsAB[ab/] DocsKnowledge[knowledge/] DocsSuperpowers[superpowers/] Migration[MIGRATION_GUIDE.md] SqlRefactor[SQL_REFACTORING_REPORT.md] end PackageJSON --> Admin PackageJSON --> Marketing PackageJSON --> Shared PnpmWorkspace --> Admin PnpmWorkspace --> Marketing PnpmWorkspace --> Shared TsConfigBase --> Shared ``` ### 前端模块结构 ```mermaid graph LR subgraph "apps/admin/" AdminSrc[src/] AdminPackage[package.json] end subgraph "apps/marketing/" MarketingSrc[src/] MarketingPackage[package.json] end subgraph "packages/shared/" SharedComponents[components/] SharedHooks[hooks/] SharedTokens[tokens/] SharedUtils[utils/] SharedPackage[package.json] end AdminSrc --> SharedComponents AdminSrc --> SharedHooks AdminSrc --> SharedTokens AdminSrc --> SharedUtils MarketingSrc --> SharedComponents MarketingSrc --> SharedHooks MarketingSrc --> SharedTokens MarketingSrc --> SharedUtils ``` ### 后端微服务架构 ```mermaid graph TB subgraph "backend/victor-ab/" Common[victor-common/] Domain[victor-domain/] Bucketing[victor-bucketing/] Infrastructure[victor-infrastructure/] Service[victor-service/] SDK[victor-sdk/] Pipeline[victor-pipeline/] Stats[victor-stats/] Web[victor-web/] Scripts[scripts/] end Common --> Domain Domain --> Bucketing Domain --> Service Domain --> Stats Infrastructure --> Service Infrastructure --> Pipeline Service --> Web Service --> SDK Pipeline --> Stats Stats --> Web ``` ## 4. 核心实现 ### 共享组件库 #### 设计令牌系统 ```mermaid graph TD Colors[colors.ts
品牌色、背景色、文本色] Spacing[spacing.ts
间距系统] Typography[typography.ts
字体系统] Radius[radius.ts
圆角系统] Shadows[shadows.ts
阴影系统] Breakpoints[breakpoints.ts
响应式断点] Colors --> Tokens[tokens/index.ts] Spacing --> Tokens Typography --> Tokens Radius --> Tokens Shadows --> Tokens Breakpoints --> Tokens ``` #### Button组件设计 共享组件库中的Button组件体现了完整的组件设计原则： ```mermaid classDiagram class Button { +variant: ButtonVariant +size: ButtonSize +loading: boolean +leftIcon: React.ReactNode +rightIcon: React.ReactNode +render(): JSX.Element } class ButtonVariant { <> primary secondary outline ghost danger } class ButtonSize { <> sm md lg } Button --> ButtonVariant Button --> ButtonSize ``` ### 实验生命周期管理 ```mermaid stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> DRAFT: 创建实验 DRAFT --> REVIEW: 提交审批 REVIEW --> DRAFT: 驳回修改 REVIEW --> RAMP: 审批通过 RAMP --> RUNNING: 灰度完成 RUNNING --> ANALYZING: 实验结束 ANALYZING --> DECISION: 生成报告 DECISION --> ARCHIVE: 执行决策 DECISION --> RUNNING: 延长实验 RUNNING --> [*]: 手动停止 ARCHIVE --> [*]: 归档完成 ``` ### 流量分配算法 ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant Client as 客户端SDK participant API as 分桶API participant Engine as 分桶引擎 participant Cache as Redis缓存 participant DB as MySQL Client->>+API: 请求用户分桶 API->>+Engine: 计算分桶结果 Engine->>+Cache: 检查缓存 Cache-->>-Engine: 返回缓存结果 Engine->>+DB: 查询实验配置 DB-->>-Engine: 返回配置信息 Engine->>Engine: MurmurHash3一致性哈希 Engine-->>-API: 返回分桶结果 API-->>-Client: 用户分组信息 ``` ## 5. 关键特性 ### 实验管理功能 #### 多层实验支持 ```mermaid graph LR Layer1[实验层1
流量隔离] Layer2[实验层2
正交分桶] Layer3[实验层3
独立配置] Layer1 --> Layer2 Layer2 --> Layer3 style Layer1 fill:#8b5cf6 style Layer2 fill:#06b6d4 style Layer3 fill:#f59e0b ``` #### 统计分析能力 ```mermaid graph TB subgraph "统计方法" ZTest[Z-Test 显著性检验] MSPRT[mSPRT 序贯检验] CUPED[CUPED 方差缩减] BH[BH 多重检验校正] AATest[A/A 测试验证] end subgraph "分析维度" TimeSeries[时间序列分析] Segmentation[人群拆分] ConflictDetection[冲突检测] end ZTest --> TimeSeries MSPRT --> TimeSeries CUPED --> Segmentation BH --> ConflictDetection ``` ### 实时监控系统 ```mermaid graph TD Kafka[Kafka事件流] --> Pipeline[数据管道] Pipeline --> ClickHouse[ClickHouse存储] ClickHouse --> Realtime[实时分析] subgraph "监控指标" Metrics[主指标监控] Safety[护栏指标] SRM[分流校验] Sample[样本追踪] end Realtime --> Metrics Realtime --> Safety Realtime --> SRM Realtime --> Sample subgraph "告警机制" AutoPause[自动暂停] ManualAlert[人工告警] Decision[智能决策] end Safety --> AutoPause SRM --> AutoPause Sample --> Decision ``` ## 6. 依赖关系分析 ### 前端依赖架构 ```mermaid graph TD subgraph "React生态" React[react@18.3.0] ReactDOM[react-dom@18.3.0] ReactRouter[react-router@6.26] Zustand[zustand@4.5] end subgraph "UI组件库" Lucide[lucide-react] Recharts[recharts] Tailwind[tailwindcss@4.0] end subgraph "开发工具" Vite[vite@5.4] TypeScript[typescript@5.6] Pnpm[pnpm@9+] end React --> Zustand React --> ReactRouter Zustand --> React Tailwind --> React Lucide --> React Recharts --> React ``` ### 后端依赖架构 ```mermaid graph TD subgraph "Spring生态" SpringBoot[spring-boot@3.4.0] SpringWeb[spring-web] SpringData[spring-data-jpa] SpringDoc[springdoc-openapi@2.5] end subgraph "数据库相关" MySQL[mysql-connector-java] MyBatisPlus[mybatis-plus@3.5.15] Redis[lettuce-redis] Flyway[flyway-core@9.5.1] end subgraph "消息队列" Kafka[kafka-clients] Jackson[jackson-databind@2.17] OkHttp[okhttp@4.12] end SpringBoot --> SpringWeb SpringBoot --> SpringData SpringBoot --> SpringDoc SpringData --> MyBatisPlus SpringData --> MySQL SpringData --> Redis SpringBoot --> Kafka Kafka --> Jackson SpringBoot --> OkHttp ``` ## 7. 结论与建议 ### 项目架构优势 1. **完整的A/B测试闭环**: 从实验创建到决策归档的全生命周期管理 2. **强大的统计分析能力**: 集成了多种统计检验方法和方差缩减技术 3. **实时监控系统**: 基于Kafka和ClickHouse的实时数据处理能力 4. **模块化设计**: 前后端均采用模块化架构，便于维护和扩展 5. **知识库系统**: 面向Agent的设计理念，支持智能化知识管理 ### 潜在改进方向 1. **性能优化**: 考虑引入更高效的缓存策略和数据库索引优化 2. **安全性增强**: 加强API安全认证和数据加密机制 3. **监控完善**: 增加更详细的性能监控和错误追踪 4. **文档完善**: 补充更多的开发文档和API文档 5. **测试覆盖**: 提高单元测试和集成测试的覆盖率 ### 下一步发展建议 1. **微服务治理**: 考虑引入服务网格和API网关 2. **容器化优化**: 完善Docker配置和Kubernetes部署 3. **CI/CD流水线**: 建立完整的持续集成和部署流程 4. **监控告警**: 完善APM监控和告警机制 5. **用户反馈**: 建立用户反馈收集和需求管理机制 --- **Sources:** - [README.md](README.md) - [package.json](package.json) - [pnpm-workspace.yaml](pnpm-workspace.yaml) - [tsconfig.base.json](tsconfig.base.json) - [packages/shared/src/index.ts](packages/shared/src/index.ts) - [packages/shared/package.json](packages/shared/package.json) - [packages/shared/src/components/Button.tsx](packages/shared/src/components/Button.tsx) - [packages/shared/src/tokens/colors.ts](packages/shared/src/tokens/colors.ts) - [docs/ab/ab_experiment_platform_design.md](docs/ab/ab_experiment_platform_design.md)
